title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was born in Beşiktepe Village, a nice village of Cyprus, as the son of a forester in 1952. At the moment of his birth, Suat İ. Günsel had already started the great adventure of his life, feeling the persistence and fortitude of his people, Turkish Cypriots who were living with trials and tribulations in various dimensions. He was one of the very first students of the English College opened in the Turkish Side of Nicosia, and graduated from this school in 1969. Following his graduation from the Department of Physics at the Middle East Technical University, he carried out his postgraduate studies and obtained a PhD on Educational Psychology.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: At one of the stages of the long way he committed, “His impressive achievements resulting with creation of institutions and foundations at the international standards in education and health sectors that are renowned worldwide, and offering these achievements into the service of his own people and the peoples of world…” would be the term of justification to be honoured with a distinguished award at an international platform. So indeed, it has been observed in his speeches on various occasions that he acts with the sense of a patriotic Turkish Cypriot who considers the education system as a “…waving stream on which achievements of our next generations are shaped on the basis of our current social and national values”. Establishing his entire life philosophy and vision upon this idea, Dr. Suat Günsel, starting from the times he established a private school where students were prepared to university entrance exams and university life, has been called as “Suat Hoca” at the university environments and in all around of Cyprus. Today, his former students, who are now professors, directors, managers, ministers or members of national assemblies, state councils, state that they still identify him with this name.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: The year is 1988 and the establishment of the Near East University was recorded in lines of history. Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was the Rector and the Founding Rector of the university. It is 2018 today: The Near East University, bearing a private foundation status in legal terms, however, being in commitment of public totally, is carrying out its multi-dimensional educational service in educational and social terms with its 19 faculties, 220 undergraduate program, 6 postgraduate institutes with 224 programs (at MA and PhD level), 4 vocational schools, 3 high schools and 28 research centers in accordance with the philosophy that Dr. Suat İ. Günsel dedicated himself to. Some of the remarkable developments of the Near East University established on a 320,000 square meters area are: The Grand Library of the Near East University that was proclaimed to be the “Central Library of Turkic World” at the Final Declaration of The International Conference organized by the Delegates of Turkic World; Super Computer that can process over 15 trillion operations within a second, the unique samples of their own kind in the Eastern Mediterranean Region, and they are available at only 28 universities all over the world; The Near East University Hospital that found life as a result of a dedicated investment over 150 million USD; Faculty of Medicine, Faculty of Dentistry and Dentistry Clinics that have been accredited by JCI (Joint Comission International), Faculty of Pharmacy that shares the same features and excellent quality of the Faculty of Dentistry, the Olympic Swimming Pool which is one of the most advanced and modern sports facility complexes of the country,

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: The Founding Rector Dr. Suat İ. Günsel states that he adores the extraordinary beauty of greenery fields of the campus as much as the advanced foundations and institutions of the university aforementioned above. And also, as Dr. Günsel states, in their white uniforms, the male and female students of the Faculty of Maritime Studies are on cruise with full speed in the vastness of the ‘Blue’. The Near East Colleges that come after the Pre-School Foundations of the Near East University are the “Foundations of Wisdom” as the pioneers of the elementary, secondary and high school education of the country in both private and general terms. And so, they represent the educational units that followers and staff of Dr. Günsel take responsibility starting from pre-school stages up to the institutes where PhD programs are carried out.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: It should be pointed out that Dr. Suat Günsel has been honoured with several important prizes and awards, and his worldly renowned achievements were also highlighted by the Forbes Magazine, one of the most prestigious magazines of the world. In August 2009, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was awarded with the “Medal of Honour” of Gagauzian Autonomous Republic at the II. World Gagauzians Conference by the President of Gagauzia, His Excellency Mihail Formuzal. In December 2009, Dr. Günsel has also been honoured with Gold Medal of Honor by Gagauzia Autonomous Republic for his precious contributions to education sector of Gagauzia Autonomous Republic. In March 2010, Dr. Günsel was awarded with “Outstanding service award” by the National Assembly of TRNC for his contributions and worldwidely renowned investments made for educational systems and health sectors of TRNC.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: Dr. Suat I. Günsel was awarded with the title of Honorary Doctorate for his outstanding success in the education sector by the Komrat University in Republic of Moldovia in April 2010. In April 2010, the Founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Günsel, was awarded with a Honorary Doctorate by Azerbaijan State University of Medicine for his contributions to health sector and for the establishment of Research Hospital of the Near East University that renowned worldwide, and he was also awarded with another Honorary Doctorate in Educational Sciences by Academy of Azerbaijan Universities for his outstanding contributions to education. In October 2010, Dr. Günsel was awarded for his contributions to Turkish culture and education system with “Türksoy Most Prestigious Golden Medal of Honour” in accordance with the decision taken at the conference of Organization of Common Directorate of International Turkish Culture and Arts by the Permanent Council of Ministers of Culture of Member Countries of TÜRKSOY.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: Moreover, Dr. Günsel was awarded with the “Golden Honorary Plaquet” by the Centre of Research Islam, History, Art and Culture for his contributions to Islamic Conference Organization. On 3 November 2010, Dr. Günsel was also entitled as the “Rowing Ambassador of TRNC” through the common decision of the President Dr. Derviş Eroğlu and the National Assembly,. On 20 January 2011, Paphos Turkish Association presented a plaque to Founding Rector Dr. Suat İ. Günsel since he was elected as the “Most Successful Paphosian” in economical issues. Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was awarded with an honorary PhD on the subject of “Innovations in Education” by the Senate of İzhevsk International Eastern European University of Republic of Udmurtia, a state of Russian Federation, on 21 February 2011. On 22 February 2011, Dr. Suat Günsel was honoured with a “Medal of Commemoration” for 60th anniversary of invention of Avtomat Kalashnikova 47 – AK 47, one of the most important patents of 20th century, by the legendary designer of this gun, General Mihail Kalashnikov.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 5 July 2011, Dr. Günsel was awarded with “Friendship Order”, the highest order of the state given to foreigners, by the President of Azerbaijan, His Excellency İlham Aliyev, for his outstanding contributions in order to develop the relations between the TRNC and the Republic of Azerbaijan, and for his contributions to Azerbaijan Diaspora. On 7th November 2011, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was awarded with the Honorary Medal in celebrations organized to commemorate the 20th anniversary of establishment of Autonomous Gagauzian Republic. On 1 December 2011, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, the Founding Rector of NEU, conferred upon a honorary PhD in education upon the decision of Senate of Odlar Yurdu University of Azerbaijan. On 20 January 2012, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was awarded with Plaque of Patriotism for his superior services for his country by Cyprus Turkish Businessmen Council.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 27 May 2013,The founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat Günsel was awarded with Honorary Doctorate Diploma for his outstanding contributions in the field of “Innovation in Education and Health” at the senate meeting of the Crimean State Engineering and Pedagogical University. On 1 June 2013, At the first Turkey Achievement Awards Ceremony organized by Turkey Life Magazine “Award of International Quality in Education” has been presented to Dr.Suat İ.Günsel due to his international contributions to education. On 2 July 2013,The 2013 Socrates Award that was awarded Dr. Suat İ. Günsel by Oxford Europe Business Assembly (EBA) at the award ceremony of Swiss Summit of Leaders held in Montreaux, Switzerland. On 19 July 2013, “Outstanding service award and plaque” was presented to Dr.Suat Günsel by Association of Journalists of the Republic of Turkey due to his national and international contributions and achievements in education and health.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 19 August 2013, As part of 20th year celebrations of Turkish Culture in service, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, the Founding Rector of Near East University paid an official visit to the General Secretary of TURKSOY, Düsein KASEİNOV. During the visit,Günsel’s 60th birthday has been celebrated. Düsein KASEİNOV, presented a plaque to Dr. GÜNSEL and put on him a traditional trawl. On 27 September 2013, Founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat Günsel presented plaque to Deputy Prime Minister of the Republic of Turkey, Prof. Dr. Beşir Atalay because of his coming for preside to the Groundbreaking Ceremonies of NEU Mosque and Univesity of Kyrenia. On 27 September 2013, Founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat Günsel presented plaque to Chairman of Religious Affairs Office and Higher Council of Religious Affairs, Prof. Dr. Raşit Küçük because of his materially and spiritually academic services and his participation in the Groundbreaking Ceremonies of NEU Mosque and University of Kyrenia.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 27 September 2013, Founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat Günsel presented plaque to the Director of Religious Affairs Department,Prof. Dr. Mehmet Görmez because of his participation in th Groundbreaking Ceremonies of NEU Mosque and University of Kyrenia. On 27 September 2013, Rector of Cumhuriyet University, Prof. Dr. Faruk Kocacık presented tree of life plaque, located on birds symbolises the peace, garnets symbolises proliferate and the eagle symbolises the power and strength, to Dr. Suat Günsel in his visiting for the Grounbreaking Ceremonies of NEU Mosque and University of Kyrenia. On 2 October 2013, Special Gold Medal of 20th Anniversary of TURKSOY was decorated to Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, the Founding Rector of Near East University Cyprus, for his outstanding contributions to cultural and educational issues of Turkic world.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 22 November 2013, The founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat Günsel was awarded with Honorary Doctorate Diploma for his outstanding contributions in the field of “Innovation in Education and Health” by Baku Eurasian University. On 13 December 2013, The Founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel granted with the title of Professor in the department of “International Relations” by the Senate of Kazakh – American University. On 23 December 2013, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was granted with the “Order of Gagauzia Republic”, the highest order of Gagauzia state for his outstanding contributions in the field of Education. On 12 February 2014, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was granted with the outstanding service award of Crimean by the Parliment of Crimean Tatars for his outstanding contributions in the field of Education.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 22 April 2014, Rector of Baku Eurasian University ,Prof. Dr. Nazım Hüseyinli presented a hand-made carpet,as a gift which is only given to important persons and precious guests,on which Dr. Günsel’s portrait was depicted. On 19 September 2014, High Honor Certificate and Gold Medal was granted to the Founding Rector Dr. Suat İ. Günsel with decision of board of directors of Martyrs Families and War Veterans Association because of his crucial contributions to country’s educational, technological and medical developments. On 23 September 2014, Retired Military Officers Association gave a plaque to Founding Rector of the Near East University, Dr. Suat Günsel because of his achievements in the field of education and health. On 30 September 2014, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was granted with “Cyprus TİAK Special Award” by the Cyprus Turkish Businessmen Council owing to his crucial contributions in promotion of Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus in the international area.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 14 October 2014, United Europe Award was presented to Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, Founding Rector of NEU by International Socrates Committee. On 2 December 2014, Dr. Suat I. Günsel, invited to the House of Lords of the United Kingdom as the special guest, delivered a speech to members of House of Lords and a selected group of guests at the Parliament of UK, and told about the achievements of NEU throughout the historical process as well as the importance and position of higher education in TRNC and in the world. On 3 December 2014, Dr. Suat I. Günsel granted with an award by the Anglo-Turkish Healthcare Professionals Association for his “outstanding contribution to health education & wellbeing in Cyprus” in Britain. On 23 December 2014, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, Founding Rector of Near East University, has been awarded with 20th Anniversary State Order by His Excellency Mikhail Formuzal, President of Gagauzia Autonomous Republic.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On 22 April 2015, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was awarded with the Oscar of the Year in recognition of his great contributions in achieving outstanding success in the field of education and health as well as for his unique efforts towards TRNC’s promotion. 24 March 2016, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, Founding Rector of Near East University, awarded with Queen Victoria Commemorative medal by Oxford Academic Union formed by leaders of higher education sector, rectors, professors and scientists from 30 countries and empowered as the Mediterranean Representative of Oxford Academic Union. On 7 May 2016, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, Founding Rector of NEU, was conferred upon a honorary doctorate by Ardahan University Senate due to his extraordinary efforts in making the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus a world brand in higher education sector, his much reputed achievements and his efforts in overcoming the embargoes through education.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: 6 November 2016, 25th Year State Order of Gagauzia was presented to Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, Founding Rector of Near East University, by Vlah Irina Fedorovna, President of Gagauzia, for his outstanding contributions in education, health and development of Gagauzia. On 7 November 2016, Oleg Budza, President of the National Confederation of Trade Unions of Moldova, presented ‘Special Honor Certificate’ of the Confederation to Dr. Suat İ. Günsel in recognition of his outstanding contributions to the young people of Moldova and Gaguiza in the field of education 5 December 2016, Awarded with honorary professorship diploma by Southern University of Russian Federation due to the contributions he made for the cooperation protocol of education signed between the Near East University and the Southern University.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: March 28, 2017, Dr. Suat İ. Günsel conferred upon the title of Honorary Professor by Academic Union Oxford. 5 June 2018, 25th Independence Anniversary Medal of Turkic Republics Awarded to Dr. Suat İ. Günsel, Founding Rector of Near East University, by TURKSOY. 25 December 2018, “Turkey’s Greatest Living Minds Award” given by Forbes Magazine to celebrate its 100th year anniversary to people who shaped the history of Turkey’s economy, left their traces and broke new grounds was presented to Dr. Suat Günsel. April 18, 2019, Near East University Founding Rector Dr. Suat İ. Günsel was awarded the Gold Medal of “True Patriot” by National Dede Qorqut Foundation of Azerbaijan for his efforts to promote the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus all over the world, his dedicated works in the field of education, health, culture and art in the TRNC and for his dedication and the important services he showed in the development of the relations between the Republic of Azerbaijan and the TRNC.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: On June 14, 2022, Dr. Suat İrfan Günsel, Founding Rector of Near East University, was presented with an Honorary Citizenship Certificate by the Tokat City Council. On September 19, 2022, Near East University Founding Rector Dr. Suat İrfan Günsel was presented with the Order of the Republic of Tatarstan by Rudenko Gulzada Rakipovna, Member of the Cultural Council of the Presidency of Tatarstan and advisor to the President, General Director of the Elabuga State History-Architecture and Art Open Air Museum for his contributions to the Turkic world in the fields of culture, arts and education, and for the strengthening of cultural ties and the development of friendship relations between the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus and the Republic of Tatarstan. September 20, 2022, TURKSOY Secretary General Sultan Raev presented Dr. Suat Irfan Gunsel with TURKSOY's highest Honor Gold Medal for his outstanding contribution to the Turkic world.

title: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
section: Dr. Suat İ. GÜNSEL – Near East University
content: December 16, 2022, Artists of the Republic of Uzbekistan presented their traditional "National Golden Robes" to Dr. Suat İrfan Günsel, which is presented to express their gratitude, love and respect to respectable people who have made important contributions to society, Turkish World and art. On May 17, 2023, Near East University Founding Rector Dr. Suat İrfan Günsel was presented with the "TURKSOY 30th Anniversary Gold Medal" by the International Organization of Turkic Culture for his outstanding contributions to the international adoption and dissemination of Turkish culture. Dr. Suat I. Günsel, the Founding Rector of the Near East University, is married and has three children.

title: Prof. Dr. Mustafa KURT – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Mustafa KURT – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers After receiving his BA degree in Foreign Language Education from Middle East Technical University, Dr. Kurt completed his MA in English Language Education at Gazi University and his PhD in Curriculum and Language Instruction at Ankara University. Before starting work at Near East University in 2001 as an assistant professor, he had worked as a lecturer at Ankara and Bilkent Universities. His research interest is in teacher education, learning theories, educational technology, multiculturalism, multilingualism and language learning. Dr. Kurt has given workshops and lectures, conducted research and published articles on various topics pertaining to language teaching, literature and education.

title: Prof. Dr. Murat TÜZÜNKAN – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Murat TÜZÜNKAN – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers After completing his primary, secondary and high school education in Lefkoşa, he studied history at the Middle East Technical University (METU) in Ankara, Turkey. He completed his MA at the METU at the Department of International Relations. In 2007, he completed his graduate education on International Relations at the Middle East Technical University with a PhD. in International Relations, the title of his thesis being “The Cyprus Question: Continuity, Transformation and Tendencies”. Currently he is an Associate Professor at the Department of International Relations of the Near East University. He worked in the Grand National Assembly of Turkey between the years of 1996–1999. Since 2013, he has been working at Near East University as a Vice Rector.

title: Prof. Dr. Şerife ZİHNİ EYÜPOĞLU – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Şerife ZİHNİ EYÜPOĞLU – Near East University
content: Was born September 5th 1969 in Jersey, Channel Islands. Her father was a barber and mother a housewife. Eyupoglu completed her primary, middle, and high school education in Jersey. She received her BA in Business Administration from Eastern Mediterranean University in 1990 and her MBA in 1992. In the 1992-93 academic year Eyupoglu started teaching at Near East University as a part-time member of staff and became full-time in the 1993-94 academic year. Eyupoglu was appointed Vice Dean of the Faculty of Economics & Administrative Sciences in the 1995-96 academic year. She received her Ph.D. in Business Administration (Organization and Management) in 2004. In 2005 she established the Department of Human Resource Management and was also appointed as the Chair. In the same year she became an Assistant Professor of Management. In 2008 she was appointed as the Chair for the Department of Business Administration, and in April 2012 Eyupoglu became an Associate Professor of Management. In November 2013 she was appointed Acting Dean of the Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences. Eyupoglu has 16 international published articles and proceeding articles (4 of which are indexed in SSCI), and has reviewed for various international journals. She is married and has two children.

section: Prof. Dr. Tamer ŞANLIDAĞ – Near East University

title: Prof. Dr. Murat TÜZÜNKAN – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Murat TÜZÜNKAN – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers After completing his primary, secondary and high school education in Lefkoşa, he studied history at the Middle East Technical University (METU) in Ankara, Turkey. He completed his MA at the METU at the Department of International Relations. In 2007, he completed his graduate education on International Relations at the Middle East Technical University with a PhD. in International Relations, the title of his thesis being “The Cyprus Question: Continuity, Transformation and Tendencies”. Currently he is an Associate Professor at the Department of International Relations of the Near East University. He worked in the Grand National Assembly of Turkey between the years of 1996–1999. Since 2013, he has been working at Near East University as a Vice Rector.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers Prof. Dr. Hüseyin Gökçekuş was born in Nicosia on 23rd December 1960. He completed his primary and secondary education in Cyprus. He completed his undergraduate education at the Department of Geological Engineering of Faculty of Sciences in Ankara University in 1982. He commenced his M.Sc. studies at Middle East Technical University (METU) under the supervision of Prof. Dr. Vedat Doyuran, and completed his studies after the submission of his M.Sc. thesis titled “Hydrogeology of Western Konya Plain and Interpretation of Groundwater Level Fluctuations” in 1984. During his years of postgraduate study, he started to work as a Research Assistant at METU in 1983 and in June1990, he completed his PhD at the Department of Geological Engineering with his thesis titled as “Hydro-geological and Hydro-geochemical Evaluation of the Güzelyurt Groundwater Basin- TRNC”; which was once again supervised by Prof. Dr. Vedat Doyuran.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Following the completion of his Ph.D. studies, he left METU, where he had conducted his studies and worked as a research assistant for 7 years, and returned to the TRNC in December 1990 to carry out his two-year military service in Yeşilırmak. Upon completion of his service in March 1992, he started to work as a lecturer at Near East University (NEU) where he worked for almost twenty years, until he was appointed as the Head of Higher Education Board of TRNC (YÖDAK). He was promoted to the rank of Assistant Professor in 1992; to the rank of Associate Professor in 1994; and to the rank of Professor in 2001. He was appointed to the rank of Assistant Professor in 1992, to Associate Professor in 1994 and finally to the rank of Professor in 2001. Throughout his career life at the Near East University, he has been assigned to various duties. He was first appointed as the Head of Department of Civil Engineering, a department to which he helped establish; Head of Department of Student Affairs; as Acting Rector; as General Secretary of the University; and as Vice Rector. Furthermore, he has been a Head of the Disciplinary Board of the University; Member of the University Senate; and as Member of the NEU Managing Board.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: In addition to editing many books, Professor Dr. Hüseyin Gökçekuş has more than 80 publications on significant issues of the country such as water, environment, earthquakes, tourism and education; published mostly in international journals. In 2003 his article titled “Pollution of Coastal Region Impacted by Acid Mine Drainage in Morpou Bay, Northern Cyprus” was published in one of the most prestigious journals of the world- Journal of Environmental Science and Health Part A. Furthermore, according to the report put by the search engine BioMedLib.com, his article has been selected among the 20 most-searched articles in its relative field for many years. Moreover, world-renowned publishing house Springer published his book titled as “Survival and Sustainability: Environmental Concerns in the 21st Century”. Within 20 months, the chapters of this book were downloaded 5944 times and broke a hard-to-beat record; it became one of the top 25 books of which chapters were mostly downloaded on Springer. By 2017, the number of times that the chapters of this book have been downloaded had reached fifteen thousand. He is currently on the editorial board of Environmental Earth Sciences Journal of Springer.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Professor Gökçekuş has made more than 140 presentations at scientific meetings mainly in Turkey and in the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus, alongside with South Cyprus, Sweden, France, Greece, United States, Italy, Austria, Morocco, Azerbaijan, England, Norway, Indonesia, Russia, Malta, Germany, Croatia, Kirghizstan and Brazil. During his career, he has shared, via the written and visual press, his scientific work with great masses and has been interviewed by over 60 press and publication institutions including the National press; by the Turkish Press; BBC Television; The Guardian, European Voice; and many other institutions alike including ones from Germany and Italy where his opinion columns have been published. On 29th February 2012, his work on “Drinking water of TRNC; the Project of this Century” was published in the ORSAM Journal, and his interview on 4-5 April 2013 where he described how the water will be brought to TRNC from Turkey with an underwater piping system, was published in the International Herald Tribune and in the New York Times, and drew attention world-wide.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Prof Dr Gökçekuş has run the presidency of many national and international symposiums and congresses on “water”, “earthquake”, “environment”, “education”, “health” and tourism”; furthermore he has been assigned as part of the Scientific Boards and Consultation and Organisation Committees of various national and international organisations. Alongside his scientific work which he has carried out over twenty five years; he has played significant roles in holding many national and international congresses, conferences, seminars, panels and workshops hosted by the Near East University, therefore promoting both NEU and the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus (TRNC) at international platforms. Additionally, his scientific works have been referenced many times and Prof. Dr. Gökçekuş has successfully represented the TRNC at scientific meetings held around the world.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: He has twice obtained Cyprus-American Scholarship Program Short Term Training Grants given by the USA – Cyprus Fulbright Commission; one of them being on “Environmental Assessment of Abandoned Mine Sites” between 4 August – 10 September 1994, and the other being on “Integrated Water Resources Management” between 7 April – 10 May 2003. During these short-term courses, he carried out his studies with the most prestigious scientists at the most prestigious universities and institutions of the USA such as the University of Vermont, VT, California Polytechnic University Pomona, CA, Yale University, New Haven CT and Brooklyn College, Brooklyn, NY. He has also carried out his studies at the centres of the United States Geological Survey Institution (USGS), which is one of the most important institutions of the USA, in various states of the USA (Headquarters, Washington D.C., National Centre, Reston, VA., U.S. Geological Survey water Resources, Division California District, Sacramento, CA., U.S. Geological Federal Centre, Denver, CO.). Furthermore, he has been engaged in studies with scientists and official staff of several scientific and environmental institutions in both California and Denver on various water and geological sources, and has carried out several observations in laboratories and terrain analyses.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Prof. Dr. Gökçekuş has attended several international workshops and courses, and has been awarded with certificates of participation and contribution. Some of these include “IBM, PC Applications in Ground Water Pollution and Hydrology”, in Boston, Massachusetts, from 14 to19 August 1994; “Joint Seismic Observation Period (JSOP) workshop” in Southern Cyprus from 15 to 17 May 1995; “Workshop on Seismic Hazard in the Mediterranean Region Earthquake Ground Shaking Maps and their Applications” from 3 to7 May 1999; “Miami-Dade Fire Rescue’s (MDFD) Training for Instructor (TFI)”, a workshop organized at the J.W. Fulbright Centre in the Buffer Zone in Nicosia, from 26 to 30 March 2001; “Integrated Water Resources Management” workshop given by the US Bureau of Reclamation of the Ministry of Interior, from 7 to 11 April 2003; “Water Management Issues” workshop given by the California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, from 14 to 29 April 2003; “Understanding the European Union” course given by the E.U. Information Centre in Nicosia from 2 to 4 June 2004; “A Study of the European Union” course from 9 to 11 June 2004; and a “Consensus in European Union” course from 16 to 18 June 2004.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Prof. Dr. Gökçekuş was awarded the “Outstanding Service Award” by the Union of Turkish Engineers and Architects’ Chamber, Chamber of Geology Engineers and Union of Cyprus Turkish Engineers and Architects, and Chamber of Mine, Geology and Metallurgical Engineers for his “Outstanding Services and Contributions on Geological Issues at National and International platforms” on 16 February 1988; he was also awarded a “Certificate for his 25th year in the profession” by the Union of Turkish Engineers and Architects’ Chamber in May 2007; with the “Golden Badge” being given by the Federation of Journalists of Mersin for his superior scientific achievements and contributions to science in June 2008. In 2007, he was awarded Pavlov Golden Badge by “International Academy of Science, Health & Ecology (Innsbruck Austria) due to his outstanding scientific success; as part of the 21st item of World Health Organisation, National Environmental Health Action Plan.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: For his publications in 2009, he was awarded “The NEU Scientific Research Award” on 3rd March 2010. In 2013, Prof. Dr. Hüseyin Gökçekuş was awarded an outstanding service and patent plaque for “Scientific Work at National and International Platforms alongside Contributions for the Recognition of TRNC” with unanimous decision of Journalists Society of Turkey and the plaque was presented by the President of TRNC Eroğlu. Finally, he was awarded the “2015 Outstanding service Award to the Turkish World” and the plaque was presented to Prof. Dr. Gökçekuş at a ceremony which was held in Ankara, Turkey. On 25th October 2010, he was elected as a Member of YÖDAK by the TRNC Parliament. Later on 26th December 2011, he was assigned as the General Coordinator of Water as part of the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus Ministry of Agriculture and Natural Resources Project; to participate in work on bringing water from Turkey and to determine water sector policies; to design water management policies of the country alongside the realisation of goals determined regarding the water sector. Then on 24th April, 2012, he was elected as the First Term President of the International Universities Search and Rescue Council through unanimous decision.

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: In accordance with the “Establishment of the Higher Education Board, the Assignment of the Head and Members” item of the Higher Education Law, he was assigned as the Head of Higher Education Board (YÖDAK) of Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus (TRNC) by the then-current President of TRNC Dr. Derviş Eroğlu on 19th September 2013. As the Head of Higher Education Board of TRNC (YÖDAK), Professor Gökçekuş had been elected as a Member of Managing Board of Association of Quality Assurance Agencies of the Islamic World in Bahrain, in February 2014. On the other hand, in 2015, he presided the “IQA Workshop” hosted by NEU through cooperation with the Higher Education Board of TRNC. As part of the Turkey-TRNC Economical Cooperation Agreement, he has contributed to the preparation of the Report on “The Preparation and Realisation of the TRNC Higher-Education Strategy Document and Action Plan” in June 2015, by the Higher Education Board of the TRNC (YÖDAK).

title: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Hüseyin GÖKÇEKUŞ – Near East University
content: Currently, he is continuing his duty as the Head of Department Civil Engineering of Near East University to which he was appointed to on 1st November, 2017. He is married to a Physician, Physiotherapy, Rehabilitation and Rheumatism Specialist Dr. Hatice Gökçekuş and is the father of two children.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers Born on July 15, 1949 in Çankırı , Turkey Graduated from the Eskisehir I.T.I.A.School of Pharmacy with diploma number 1 in 1972 and became a research assistant in the Pharmacognosy Department of the same school. Did his Ph.D. in Pharmacognosy between 1974-1978 at Chelsea College of the University of London. Upon returning home, worked as a Lecturer in Pharmacognosy at the school he earlier graduated, and served as the Director of Eskisehir I.T.I.A. School of Chemical Engineering between 1978-1980. Promoted to Associate-Professorship in Pharmacognosy in 1981 Prof. Dr. Kemal hüsnü Can Başer Served as Dean of the Faculty of Pharmacy at Anadolu University (1993-2001), Vice-Dean of the Faculty of Pharmacy (1982-1993), Head of the Department of Professional Pharmaceutical Sciences (1982-1993), Head of the Pharmacognosy Section (1982-ongoing), Member of the University Board and Senate [1982-2001; 2007-2010 (Senate)], and Director of the Medicinal and Aromatic Plant and Drug Research Centre (TBAM) (1980-2002) in Anadolu University.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Between 1984-1994, appointed at the National Project Coordinator of the Phase I and Phase II of the UNDP/UNIDO projects of the Government of Turkey titled “Production of Pharmaceutical Materials from Medicinal and Aromatic Plants” through which TBAM has been strengthened. Promoted to Full-Professorship in Pharmacognosy in 1987. Since 1988, organized ten in-plant group training programmes for the benefit of developing country scientists. The programme titled “Training in the Utilization of Medicinal and Aromatic Plants in Pharmaceutical and Related Industries (TRUMAP)” was held every September for 25 days for ten selected participants from among those nominated by developing countries. The programme was co-financed by the Government of Turkey and UNIDO (United Nations Industrial Development Organization) and was the only one of its kind in the world. 100 participants from 40 countries were trained in ten programmes.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Worked as UNIDO Consultant in Nigeria , Ghana , Sierra Leone , Sudan and Iran for a total of 6 months to develop projects on industrial utilization of indigenous medicinal and aromatic plants. Two of the projects were implemented. Between October 6-26, 1997 , worked as a UNIDO consultant on quality improvement of essential oils in South Africa , Zambia , Malawi , Uganda , Ethiopia and Ghana, Worked as a short-term consultant at a UNIDO project on essential oils in November-December 2012 in Egypt; at a FAO project on medicinal and aromatic non-wood forest products in February 2013 in Uzbekistan; and at a UNIDO project on fragrances in August 2018 in Oman. 1995 Recipient of the Distinguished Service Medal of IFEAT (International Federation of Essential Oils and Aroma Trades) based in London , U.K.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Appointed as a Scientific Consultant to IFEAT in 1996. National point of contact for Asian Pacific Information Network of Medicinal and Aromatic Plants (APINMAP) (1992-1997) and Useful Plants of the Mediterranean Network (MEDUSA) in Turkey (1996-2000). Served as Member of the Turkish Pharmacopoeia Commission (1985-2012), Member of the Registration Commission for Plant Drugs at the Ministry of Health (1985-1992), Member of the No.11 Group of Experts of the European Pharmacopoeia Commission (1995-1999). Member of the 13B Group of Experts of the EP Commission (1999-2012). Member of the TCM Working Party of the EP Commission (2008-2012). Served as Secretary-General of the International Council of Medicinal and Aromatic Plants (ICMAP) between November 1997 and February 2003. In February 2003 in Chiang Mai (Thailand ) elected as the Vice-President of ICMAP. In November 2008 at Cape Town, South Africa elected as the president of ICMAP. In August 2014 ay Brisbane, Australia elected as vice-president responsible for organizing WOCMAP VI in 2019 in Famagusta, North Cyprus.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Conducting R&D and training activities on rational utilization of the flora of Turkey . He has been implementing a project concerning the comprehensive screening of the flora of Turkey for new or potential sources of essential oils. Appointed as a member of the Executive Committee of the Academy of Pharmacy of the Turkish Pharmacists’ Association in 2006, and as its President in February 2008 and served until 2012. Established Biological Activity Screening, Animal Tissue Culture, Cosmetology, Biotransformation and Antioxidant Activity Testing Laboratories at TBAM during its lifetime. Founder of the Herbarium of the Faculty of Pharmacy at Anadolu University (Acronym= ESSE). As a result of agreements established between the Institute of the Chemistry of Plant Substances (ICPS) of the Uzbekistan Academy of Sciences and the Medicinal and Aromatic Plant and Drug Research Centre (TBAM) of Anadolu University in 1993, exchanges of many research scientists were established between the two institutions and from 1994 on a biennial scientific symposium entitled “International Symposium on the Chemistry of Natural Compounds (SCNC) has been organized alternately in Uzbekistan and Turkey [1st 1994 Tashkent; 2nd 1996 Eskisehir; 3rd 1998 Bukhara; 4th 2001 Isparta; 5th 2003 Tashkent; 6th 2005 Ankara; 7th 2007 Tashkent; 8th 2009 Eskisehir; 9th 2011 Urumqi (China); 10th 2013 Tashkent]. 11th SCNC held on 1-4 October 2015 in Antalya. 12th 2017 Tashkent.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Founding member and president (until 2002) of the Turkish Society of Cosmetic Scientists (TCoS). Founding member of the Turkish Phytotherapy Society. Acted as founding member and vice-president of the Society for Flora Research founded in April 2005 in Istanbul, Turkey. As President of TCoS, organized four International Cosmetic Symposia (IcoS) since 1993 in Turkey . He organized the 2nd and 8th International Symposium on the Chemistry of Natural Compounds (SCNC) in 1996 and 2009; 28th International Symposium on Essential Oils (ISEO) in 1997 in Eskisehir and served as Chairman of the Scientific Committee of the 13th International Congress of Flavours, Fragrances and Essential Oils (ICEOFF) held in 1995 in Istanbul and as Vice-President of the 2nd World Congress on Medicinal and Aromatic Plants for Human Welfare (WOCMAP II) held in 1997 in Mendoza, Argentina, and served in the Organizing Committee of WOCMAP III held in 2003 in Chiang Mai, Thailand, WOCMAP IV held in 2008 in Cape Town, South Africa and WOCMAP V in 2014 in Brisbane, Australia. He will organize the 6th WOCMAP on May 1-5, 2019 in Turkey. President of the 4th International Congress on Ethnobotany (ICEB) held in 2005 in Istanbul. Chairman of the 7th International Symposium on Plant Life of South West Asia (7th PLoSWA) held in 2007 in Eskisehir. Permanent Member of the International Symposium on Essential Oils (ISEO) since 1997. He organized the 42nd ISEO in 2011 in Antalya and 45th ISEO in 2014 in Istanbul. He also organized the International Symposium on Herbal Products in Animal Health and Nutrition (HERBAN) in 2011 in Antalya. Co-Chairman of the biennial International Symposium on the Chemistry of Natural Compounds (SCNC) held alternately in Uzbekistan and Turkey since 1993. He organized Advances in Lamiaceae Science Symposium in 2017 in Antalya. He organized over 40 scientific meetings since 1987.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Became a Fellow of the Linnean Society (FLS), the most prestigious society of biological sciences based in London, in February 1998. Member, WHO (World Health Organization) Expert Advisory Panel on Traditional Medicine (2007-2015). His term has been extended recently. Elected as a member of the Advisory Board of GA (The Society for Medicinal Plant and Natural Product Research) (2009-20149 and organized the 59th International Symposium of GA in September 2011 in Antalya, Turkey. Awarded “Memorial Silver Medal” of the Scientific Partnership Foundation of Russia for promoting scientific partnership among young scientists and for his contribution to the development of science during the 5 th International Symposium on the Chemistry of Natural Compounds (5th SCNC) held in May 2003 in Tashkent, Uzbekistan.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Awarded “Academician Award” among the Pharmacy Awards 2004 held for the first time in Turkey in May 2004. Recipient of “Centennial Success in Career Award” of Rotary Turkey , 15 January 2005. Recipient of “Science Award” of the Academy of Pharmacy of the Turkish Pharmacists’ Association given first time in 2005. Recipient of “Science Award” (Health Sciences) of the Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) as announced in 24 July 2005. Award received on 28 December 2005 in Ankara, Turkey. Recipient of “Science Award” of the Society of Contemporary Journalists Eskisehir Branch, 15 January 2006. Recipient of 2008 “Science Award” (Health Sciences) of Popular Science Magazine, 22 February 2009, Ankara. Recipient of ISHS (International Society for Horticultural Science) Medal, 20 August 2014, Brisbane, Australia.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Prof.Baser is among the group of scientists who named five new plant species and identified two plant species as new record for the flora of Turkey . Three plants have been named after him in recent years: Origanum husnucan-baseri H.Duman, Z.Aytac et A.Duran and Aristolochia baseri Malyer et Erken, Centaurea baseri Kose et Alan Joint Editor of the 2nd supplement (Vol.11) to the Flora of Turkey and the East Aegean Islands of the late Prof.P.H.Davis (2000). Prof. Baser and Prof. F. Demirci founded a biotechnology company (BadeBIO) at the Eskisehir Technopark (ATAP) (November 2009). Editor of the book “Essential Oils: Science, Technology and Applications” together with Prof. Dr. Gerhard Buchbauer of Vienna University, CRC Press (Taylor & Francis), January 2010. 2nd Edition was published in November 2016 and won James A. Duke Excellence in Botanical Literature award of American Botanical Council in March 2017. 3rd edition of the book was published in August 2020.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Natural Product Communications journal dedicated a special issue [5(9)2010] in honour of Prof. Baser’s 60th birthday (September 2010). Appointed as Adviser to Rector of Anadolu University on Scientific publications (2010-2011). Retired from his University job on February 16, 2011. Visiting Professor at the Botany and Microbiology Department of the College of Science of King Saud University in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, implementing research projects. Appointed as International Board Member of the Organization for the Phyto Taxonomic Investigation of the Mediterranean Area (OPTIMA) (2013-2019). Accepted a part-time job as Director of the Technology Transfer Office (TTO) at Bahcesehir University in Istanbul, Turkey (November 2013-July 2014). Assumed duty as Professor at Faculty of Pharmacy, Near East University, Nicosia (Lefkoşa) in Northern Cyprus.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Elected as Member of the Science Academy of Turkey on November 27, 2016. Appointed as Director of the Graduate Institute of Health Sciences of Near East University, Nicosia (Lefkoşa) in Northern Cyprus by February 24, 2017. Appointed as Director of the Institute of Graduate Studies of the Near East University, Nicosia (Lefkoşa) in Northern Cyprus by November 2020. His name appeared in the 35th rank among the “100 Turks Guiding Science” book published by Sanko Holding in May 2017. He was awarded votive tablet by the Academy of Pharmacy of the Turkish Pharmacists Association in 2017. He received Publication Award of Near East University in 2017 and 2018; and Publication Honour Award in 2018. He received Publication Award and Best Academician Award of Near East University in 2019. Recipient of the Altin Havan (Golden Mortar) Service Award of Eczaci journal (2019).

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: His major areas of research include essential oils, alkaloids, and biological, chemical, pharmacological, technological and biological activity research into natural products. Published 853 papers in international refereed journals (667 in SCI journals), 188 papers in Turkish journals and 142 papers in Conference Proceedings. His 611 articles were cited at least 11.371 times (According to SCI). His H-index is 49. According to Google Scholar, his articles have been cited 28926 times and his h-index is 73. His i10-index is 574. Communicated 1038 papers in 302 symposia. Gave 51 conferences for different organizations and societies. Author of 61 books or book chapters and 19 project reports. Completed 18 research and 16 development projects. He has published 1242 scientific contributions as papers, books or book chapters excluding the 19 project reports. His 6 books were published in Japan, UK and USA.

title: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. K. Hüsnü Can Başer – Near East University
content: Recently three national research projects, one FP6 and two FP7 projects have been implemented by him. Member of 35 international and national scientific societies. Member of the Editorial Board of 22 scientific journals. Editor-in-Chief of the journals Natural Volatiles and Essential Oils (NVEO) and NEU Pharmacy Supervised 19 MSc and 10 PhD theses. Married. Two sons. 3 grandchildren.

title: Prof. Gamze MOCAN, MD – Near East University
section: Prof. Gamze MOCAN, MD – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers Prof. Dr. Gamze Mocan Ankara Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi’nden 1974 yılında mezun olmuştur. Aynı yıl Hacettepe Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi’nde uzmanlık eğitimine başlamıştır. 1978 yılında patoloji uzmanı olup, aynı üniversitede öğretim görevlisi, yardımcı doçent ve doçentlik aşamalarından sonra 1992 yılında Hacettepe Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Profesörlük kadrosuna atanmıştır. 1985’de İngiltere Glasgow Western Infirmary Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Patoloji Departmanı’nda karaciğerde hepatit B viral lezyonlarında immünohistokimyasal yöntemle araştırmalar yapmıştır. 1991’de Amerika Birleşik Devletleri Bethesda-Maryland’de Armed Forces Institute of Pathology’de üropatoloji ve sitopatoloji bölümlerinde çalışmıştır.

title: Prof. Gamze MOCAN, MD – Near East University
section: Prof. Gamze MOCAN, MD – Near East University
content: 1992-2003 yılları arasında Hacettepe Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Patoloji Anabilim Dalı’nda Sitoloji Ünitesi Başkanlığı ve 11 yıl Tıp Fakültesi Eğitim Koordinatörlüğü görevlerinde bulunan Profesör Mocan 2003-2006 tarihlerinde Zonguldak Karaelmas Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Dekanı olarak atanmış, eş zamanlı olarak Hacettepe Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Patoloji Anabilim Dalı akademik kadrosunda da yer almıştır. 1993-95 yılları arasında Ankara Patoloji Derneği Başkanlığı, 1994-96 yılları arasında Türk Tabipleri Birliği Uzmanlık Dernekleri Koordinasyon Kurulu (UDKK) Üyeliği, 1995’te XII. Ulusal Patoloji Sempozyumu Başkanlığı, 1996’da XII. Ulusal Patoloji Kongresi Başkanlığı, 1998’de XIV. Ulusal Patoloji Sempozyumu Başkanlığı, 2001-02 yılları arasında Sitopatoloji Çalışma Grubu Başkanlığı, 2001-04 süresince Avrupa Sitoloji Dernekleri Federasyonu (EFCS) Türkiye Delegesi, 2002-04 yıllarında Sitopatoloji Derneği Kurucu Başkanı olarak derneğin başkanlığını yapmıştır.

title: Prof. Gamze MOCAN, MD – Near East University
section: Prof. Gamze MOCAN, MD – Near East University
content: 1996 yılından bu yana Avrupa Tıp Uzmanları Birliği Patoloji Board Türkiye Delegesidir. 2003 yılından beri Dünya Patoloji ve Tıp Laboratuarları Birliği (World Association of Society of Pathology and Laboratory Medicine-WASPaLM) Yönetim Kurulu üyesidir. XXIII. Dünya Patoloji ve Tıp Laboratuarları Kongresi başkanı olmuştur (İstanbul-2003). 2009-2011 yılları arasında WASPaLM gelecek dönem başkanı, 2011-2013 yılları arasında dönem başkanlığı ve 2013-2015 yılları arasında da geçmiş dönem başkanlığı yapmıştır. Ekim 2008 tarihinden itibaren KKTC Yakın Doğu Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Dekanı olarak görev yapmaktadır. Jinekopatoloji ve sitopatoloji özel ilgi alanıdır. WASPaLM Bulgar Fen Bilimleri ve Sanat Akademisi ile Malezya Tıp Akademisi tarafında verilmiş onur madalyaları bulunmaktadır.

title: Prof. Dr. Mehmet Mahfuz SÖYLEMEZ – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Mehmet Mahfuz SÖYLEMEZ – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers

title: Prof. Dr. Ali Efdal ÖZKUL – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Ali Efdal ÖZKUL – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers He was born on 20th June 1972 in Famagusta. After graduating from Nicosia Türk Maarif College in 1990, he finished the History Department of the Literature Faculty in Ege University (1991-1995). His dissertation was named the 4th of Şer-i documents of Nicosia (H. 1043-1046). In the Social Sciences Department of the same university, he did his masters degree (1995-1998). His thesis was called the 17th of Şer-i documents of Nicosia (H.1157-1161/1744-1748). He also did his PhD in the Turcology Research Institute of Marmara University (1998-2002) and his PhD thesis was titled The socio-economic history of Cyprus (1726-1750). He became Assistant Professor in 2004 and Associate Professor in 2007.

title: Prof. Dr. Ali Efdal ÖZKUL – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Ali Efdal ÖZKUL – Near East University
content: He has various national and international publications on the social, economical and political history of Cyprus and on the history of Turkish Republic. In addition to these, he provides in-service training for the teachers working for the Ministry of Education, Youth and Sport and for the tourist guides working for the Ministry of Tourism and Culture in TRNC., As well as working as a lecturer in the Near East University, he is the acting director of Ataturk Research Centre and the department head of History Teaching.

title: Prof. Dr. Şerife EYÜPOĞLU – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Şerife EYÜPOĞLU – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers Was born September 5th 1969 in Jersey, Channel Islands. Her father was a barber and mother a housewife. Eyupoglu completed her primary, middle, and high school education in Jersey. She received her BA in Business Administration from Eastern Mediterranean University in 1990 and her MBA in 1992. In the 1992-93 academic year Eyupoglu started teaching at Near East University as a part-time member of staff and became full-time in the 1993-94 academic year. Eyupoglu was appointed Vice Dean of the Faculty of Economics & Administrative Sciences in the 1995-96 academic year. She received her Ph.D. in Business Administration (Organization and Manangement) in 2004. In 2005 she established the Department of Human Resource Manangement and was also appointed as the Chair. In the same year she became an Assisatant Professor of Management. In 2008 she was appointed as the Chair for the Department of Business Adminstration, and in April 2012 Eyupoglu became an Associate Professor of Management. In November 2013 she was appointed Acting Dean of the Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences. Eyupoglu has 16 international published articles and proceeding articles (4 of which are indexed in SSCI), and has reviewed for various international journals. She is married and has two children.

title: Prof. Dr. Bülent BİLGEHAN – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Bülent BİLGEHAN – Near East University
content: Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees | Administrative Units Vision-Mission-Our Value Accreditations, Equivalences, Memberships Our University in Numbers Prof. Bülent Bilgehan was born on 15 October 1958 in Balalan Cyprus. He studied his primary school in Balalan and completed his high school education in Namık Kemal Lisesi in Famagusta. Thereafter, he moved to London where he studied BSc in electrical and electronic engineering at Southbank University. He graduated with high honors diploma. He was employed by British Telecom in 1982. After a year he joint to another English company named as Adcola where he gained experience on manufacturing technology regarding the printed circuit boards. Prof. Bilgehan moved back to his home country Cyprus in 1984 where he established his own electronic based company.

title: Prof. Dr. Bülent BİLGEHAN – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Bülent BİLGEHAN – Near East University
content: He was the first to implement satellite communication systems in the island. Cyprus is small island and very difficult to keep up to date with fast changing technology. Therefore, he registered to an MSc program in electrical and electronic engineering at Eastern Mediterranean University. He graduated in 1987 and was offered a part time lecturer position at the same university. He was able to combine theory with practice. Prof. Bilgehan continued to study a part time PhD program at Eastern Mediterranean University. He graduated and joined to Cyprus International University as a full time lecturer. He was appointed as the head of the electrical and electronic engineering department. He became Assistant professor in 2006. He joined to Girne American University as a lecturer and became Associate professor in 2009. He became a professor in 2015. He was then appointed as the director of vocational school at the same university. He joined to Near East University in 2017. He became the head of Electrical and Electronic engineering department. He has awards and prizes and he is a member of many international institutions. His research articles are in the field of signal processing. Prof. Bilgehan can speak Turkish, English and Greek language.

title: Prof. Dr. Bülent BİLGEHAN – Near East University
section: Prof. Dr. Bülent BİLGEHAN – Near East University
content: Teaching courses: Wireless Communication Systems, Digital Signal Processing, Signals and Systems, Satellite Communication Systems. He is married and the father of two children.
